title: cinnamomum rosselianum
intro: Cinnamomum rosselianum is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, native to the Philippines, and is commonly known as the Philippine cinnamon tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cinnamomum rosselianum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Cinnamomum rosselianum is often prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or powder, which can be used to treat various ailments, and is also used as a flavoring agent in cooking and perfumery.
